idea-plugin.name: AI Commit Message Generator
idea-plugin.description:
AI Commit Message Generator

Automatically generate commit messages using AI based on your code changes.

Works with any VCS: Git, SVN, Mercurial, Perforce, and more!

Features

  • Add a button in the commit dialog to generate commit messages
  • Analyze staged changes and generate meaningful commit messages
  • Customizable AI provider: Ollama, OpenAI, or OpenRouter
  • VCS-agnostic: works with Git, SVN, Mercurial, and any VCS supported by IntelliJ
  • Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux

Usage

  1. Configure AI provider in Settings → Tools → AI Commit Message Generator
  2. Open the commit dialog (Ctrl+K / Cmd+K)
  3. Click the "Commit助手" button
  4. Review and edit the generated message
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.4

  • VCS-agnostic: removed Git dependency, now works with any VCS
  • Use IntelliJ's native diff API instead of shelling out to git
  • Added context window presets for different model sizes
  • Added diff compression and truncation for large changesets
  • Improved error handling with token limit suggestions
  • Support URL # suffix for custom API endpoints
  • UI improvements: sections, API key visibility toggle, community link
